monitor_the_situation.title: Israel Strikes Bint Jbeil District in Southern Lebanon
— S3 · Conflict · Bint Jbeil District, Lebanon · 1h ago. Israeli forces target the Bint Jbeil district in southern Lebanon, as reported by Lebanon's National News Agency.
IDF Pursues West Bank Car Ramming Attack Suspects
— S3 · Conflict · West Bank, Palestine · 7h ago. Israeli Defense Forces are hunting suspects in a car ramming attack near Shavei Shomron checkpoint in the West Bank.
Report: 90% of Gaza Destroyed, 80% Seized by Israel After 1,00 Days of War

— S3 · Conflict · Gaza Strip, Palestine · 8h ago. A new report following 1,00 days since October 7, 2023, indicates 90% of the Gaza Strip is destroyed and 80% is under Israeli control, with peace efforts stalled.
